name: Rain Maker
description: Notes This completely unique trap consumes MP for every shot, creating a rain AOE near your character. It can deal huge amounts of burst damage. However, this trap’s range is very short.
effects: While Key Held and Shooting: Rain falls 4.5 tiles away in the direction of your cursor MP Cost: Drains 68 MP/sec while shooting Rain: Deals 500-550 armor piercing damage
